title: [Cloud] Flamingo - Pair headset with charge case
scenario: Verify that a Flamingo headset paired with the app and logged into an account is properly displayed on the Cloud website with separate earpiece and charge case entries when paired with the charge case.
steps: Place the headset in the charge case
expected: Headset turns on. The app shows battery levels for both the headset and the charge case. The Cloud web page displays the device as "Voyager Legend 50 UC". The device details page shows separate entries for the earpiece and charge case with images and component sections.
